<!-- markdownlint-disable MD041 -->
<!--
  Thanks for creating a pull request to request a new sub-domain from mmdevs.org

  - pr_type : One of the followings:
    1. register : Register new sub-domain
    2. update : Update cname_value of existing sub-domain
    3. remove : Remove all dns records of sub-domain
  - site_repo : The repository that host your site.
  - site_url : Where your site content can be see.
 -->

- pr_type : <type_of_pr>
- site_repo : <repo_link>
- site_url : <url_link>
